untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book depth analysis (>75% depletion), bid-ask spread percentile ranking (>90th percentile), and one-sided volume ratio (>3x typical) — none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. Translated using proxies: bb_pct_b for extreme price deviation, bb_bandwidth for spread widening, and volume ratio approximated via close position relative to MA. However, true microstructure conditions (order book imbalance, spread percentile, depth depletion) cannot be accurately replicated.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved. Entry uses Bollinger Band extremes (bb_pct_b >0.975 for long, <0.025 for short) as proxy for 2.5 SD deviation from 20-day MA. bb_bandwidth >0.08 approximates >90th percentile spread widening. Volume ratio condition could not be expressed without order book data. Exit uses MA reversion (120-min hold approximated as 1 day max hold). Stop loss set to 0.5 SD as specified. Position size and regime filtering preserved from parameters.
